title: Team continuation: Dusky soft pending-graduations route hygiene
body: Team continuation report: Identity Dusky Stealing Veil / codex / GPT-5 / 019e5a. Foundation refreshed: start-right-team, consolidate-docs, napkin/distilled, identity, active claims, commit queue, git status/log, memory, and fitness context. Current state: inherited tree is dirty with peer source/tooling lanes; no active commit queue entries; no hard/critical fitness in latest strict-hard evidence; active claims do not cover pending-graduations.md. Intended boundary: .agent/memory/operational/pending-graduations.md and the critical-drain plan only, adding explicit owner-decision packet pointers to the three due entries without promoting PDR/rule doctrine. Watcher is running on all channels.
